prompt: Cinematic ultra-realistic close pursuit scene, camera positioned less than one meter in front of the fleeing husband, extreme close-up perspective, terrified man dominating 80% of the frame, sweat on skin, visible pores, bloodshot eyes, veins bulging in neck, mouth wide open screaming in pure panic, messy hair blown backward from sprinting, wrinkled dark pajama shirt, one slipper missing. Behind him, slightly out of focus but still clearly visible, furious woman exploding out of the front door wearing a bathrobe and fluffy slippers, wielding a heavy cast iron frying pan raised above her head, face twisted with uncontrollable rage, hair flying wildly in every direction. Breakfast chaos erupting through the air between them, shattered coffee mugs, flying toast, scrambled eggs, orange juice droplets frozen in motion, tiny debris particles catching sunlight. Real suburban house entrance, concrete walkway, front lawn, authentic residential neighborhood. Shot on Arri Alexa 35, Zeiss Supreme Prime 35mm T1.5, camera operator running backwards directly in front of the husband, cinematic chase photography, realistic motion blur only on limbs and background, sharp focus locked on the husband's terrified face. Golden hour morning sunlight from side angle, physically accurate skin rendering, subsurface scattering, natural shadows, realistic reflections in eyes, documentary-style realism, Hollywood comedy movie frame, practical lighting, Kodak Vision3 film emulation, subtle film grain, hyperrealistic, ultra detailed, RAW photo quality, photorealistic, no CGI, no cartoon, no AI look, no overprocessed HDR, 8K, masterpiece, award-winning cinematic photography, dynamic Dutch angle, extreme sense of speed and urgency, vertical composition --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 8

promptZh: 电影级超写实近距离追逐场景，摄像机位于逃跑丈夫前方不到一米处，极度特写视角，惊恐 男子占据画面 80%，皮肤上的汗水、清晰可见的毛孔、充血的双眼、颈部青筋暴起，嘴巴大张发出惊恐的尖叫，凌乱的头发因奔跑向后飞扬，穿着皱巴巴的深色睡衣，丢了一只拖鞋。在他身后，背景略微失焦但清晰可见，愤怒的妻子穿着 浴袍和毛绒拖鞋 从前门冲出，手中挥舞着高举过头的沉重铸铁平底锅，面部因无法抑制的愤怒而扭曲，头发向四面八方狂乱飞舞。早餐的混乱在两人之间爆发，破碎的咖啡杯、飞溅的吐司、炒蛋、凝固在空中的橙汁液滴，细小的碎片在阳光下闪烁。真实的郊区房屋入口、混凝土人行道、前草坪，地道的住宅区环境。使用 Arri Alexa 35 拍摄，搭配 Zeiss Supreme Prime 35mm T1.5 镜头，摄影师在丈夫正前方倒退奔跑，电影级追逐摄影，仅在四肢和背景处保留真实的动态模糊，焦点锁定在丈夫惊恐的面部。黄金时刻的侧向晨光，物理级精准的皮肤渲染，次表面散射，自然阴影，眼中真实的倒影，纪录片风格的写实感，好莱坞喜剧电影画面，实用照明，Kodak Vision3 胶片模拟，细腻的胶片颗粒感，超写实，极致细节，RAW 照片画质，照片级真实，无 CGI，无卡通感，无 AI 感，无过度处理的 HDR，8K，杰作，屡获殊荣的电影摄影，动态荷兰式倾斜构图，极强的速度感与紧迫感，竖构图 --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 8
